task_completion.description: Open the base rocket design in OpenRocket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application is open and the title bar or component tree shows 'flutter_base' loaded.

task_completion.description: Configure the rocket for an Aerotech K550W motor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Motors & Configuration' tab in OpenRocket shows an 'Aerotech K550' or 'K550W' motor assigned to the rocket.

task_completion.description: Modify the Trapezoidal fin set to use Carbon fiber or Fiberglass with a thickness of at least 5.0 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fin configuration window shows the material set to Carbon fiber or Fiberglass, and the thickness is set to at least 5.0 mm (or 0.5 cm).

task_completion.description: Add at least 0.3 kg of mass to the Nose cone
task_completion.visual_evidence: A mass component is added to the Nose cone in the component tree, and its configuration window shows a mass of at least 0.3 kg (300 g).

task_completion.description: Achieve a stability margin of at least 1.5 and pass flight simulation without warnings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab shows a successful simulation with no warning icons (e.g., green checkmarks), and the main window or simulation details show a stability margin of at least 1.5 cal.

task_completion.description: Save the upgraded design and export an engineering report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Save dialogs, file manager, or terminal windows show 'supersonic_upgrade.ork' saved in /home/ga/Documents/rockets/ and 'flutter_report.txt' saved in /home/ga/Documents/exports/.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the rocket design
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with OpenRocket dialogs and menus, rather than editing the .ork XML file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: Simulation results appear to come from genuine software interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: The simulation tab shows actual computed flight data (apogee, velocity, etc.) that corresponds to a high-power K-class motor flight, not empty or mocked data.

integrity.description: Agent created the engineering report manually or via application export
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor or export dialog is visible showing the creation of 'flutter_report.txt' with the required documentation (motor, fin material/thickness, nose ballast, stability margin).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The base design is 'flutter_base.ork'. The expected motor is an Aerotech K550. The fins must be thickened to at least 4.9 mm (0.0049 m) using a composite material (density >= 1500 kg/m^3, e.g., Fiberglass or Carbon fiber). The nose ballast must be at least 0.29 kg. The final design must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/supersonic_upgrade.ork' and the report to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/flutter_report.txt'.
